name: restaurant owners processing 20–50 reservations/week tool
description: For restaurant owners processing 20–50 reservations/week, manual booking causes customer dissatisfaction. We automate the booking process instead of manual reservation management via phone and paper.
problem_solved: Booking errors and customer dissatisfaction due to manual reservation processes.
